200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, Royal Trapper makes a precise strike against the target of the attack. The strike deals physical damage equal to 10% of their max health.

description 4/6

Once in a while, Royal Trapper makes a precise strike against the target of the attack. The strike deals physical damage equal to 15% of their max health. Once in a while, Royal Trapper casts a net over the target for 2 sec. During this time, the target can’t move, its attack speed is reduced by 50%, and it can’t use weapon abilities. Once in a while, the next 3 attacks cover the target with acid. The target takes 150000 magic damage for 3 sec. The acid corrodes their armor, reducing it by 15% per second for a total of 3 sec. When the armor reduction reaches 45%, the effect lasts for another 2 sec. Once in a while, Royal Trapper uses a booster to remove all healing-reducing effects and can’t be affected by those effects for 5 sec. Royal Trapper also restores 15% health and increases their attack speed by 50% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while, Royal Trapper makes a precise strike against the target of the attack. The strike deals physical damage equal to 20% of their max health. Once in a while, Royal Trapper casts a net over the target for 3 sec. During this time, the target can’t move, its attack speed is reduced by 50%, and it can’t use weapon abilities. Once in a while, the next 5 attacks cover the target with acid. The target takes 350000 magic damage for 3 sec. When the armor reduction reaches 48%, the effect lasts for another 2 sec. Once in a while, Royal Trapper uses a booster to remove all debuffs and can’t be affected by effects that reduce healing for 5 sec. Royal Trapper also restores 25% health and increases their attack speed by 75% for 5 sec. While the booster is in effect, whenever Royal Trapper casts a net, they cast another net on the enemy with the highest damage. Once in a while, casts a net over the target, uses a booster, and starts an aggressive series of attacks for 5 sec. Each second, Royal Trapper deals physical damage to the target of the attack equal to 400% of their attack and additionally deals physical damage equal to 12% of the target’s max health. Damage from the ability ignores 60% of the target’s armor. Royal Trapper also restores 25% health from the damage dealt by the attack and covers the target with acid every second. The target takes 350000 magic damage for 3 sec. The acid corrodes their armor, reducing it by 16% per second for a total of 3 sec. When the armor reduction reaches 48%, the effect lasts for another 2 sec. When the target of a Royal Trapper’s attack dies, the unit instantly moves to the nearest enemy, dealing pure damage to that enemy equal to 20% of their max health.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Damage from a precise strike ignores 30% of the target’s armor.

description 4/6

Damage from a precise strike ignores 30% of the target’s armor. When using the booster, the unit goes into a frenzy, and all stats increase by 20% for 10 sec.

description 6/6

Damage from a precise strike ignores 30% of the target’s armor. When using the booster, the unit goes into a frenzy, and all stats increase by 20% for 10 sec. Aggressive series of attacks also deal damage in a small area around the target.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Once in a while, Royal Trapper restores 8% of their max health.

description 4/6

Once in a while, Royal Trapper restores 8% of their max health. When using the booster, Royal Trapper takes 25% less damage for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while, Royal Trapper restores 8% of their max health. When using the booster, Royal Trapper takes 25% less damage for 5 sec. When the target of a Royal Trapper’s attacks restores health, Royal Trapper copies 65% of that healing.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

On hit with a precise strike, Royal Trapper increases the damage dealt to the target by 25% for 2 sec.

description 4/6

On hit with a precise strike, Royal Trapper increases the damage dealt to the target by 25% for 2 sec. When using a net, it is also cast all enemies in a small radius around the the target.

description 6/6

On hit with a precise strike, Royal Trapper increases the damage dealt to the target by 25% for 2 sec. When using a net, it is also cast all enemies in a small radius around the the target. When the target of the Royal Trapper’s attack dies, they gain a shield that absorbs 5 attacks.

Materials

Gift from the King
Mark of the Trapper
Protective Pauldron
Ceremonial Decoration
Halo
Suggested gears for the set
